title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Delhi Development Act, 1957. (2) It extends to the whole of the 1[National Capital Territory of Delhi]. (3) It shall come into force on such date2 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1 Subs. by Act 36 of 1996, s. 2, for "Union territory of Delhi" (w.e.f. 21-12-1996). 2 30th December, 1957, vide notification No. S. R. O. 120, dated 30th December, 1957, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part. II, sec. 3.
